items.title: OpenAI vows safety policy changes after Tumbler Ridge shooting
items.dek: The tech firm has been criticised for not reporting the suspect's ChatGPT account to police despite it being flagged internally due to concerns over content.
items.body: The tech firm has been criticised for not reporting the suspect's ChatGPT account to police despite it being flagged internally due to concerns over content.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Obnoxious' AI chatbot talked about its mother, customers say
items.dek: Australian supermarket giant Woolworths tweaks its AI-powered assistant after users said it gave them the "ick".
items.body: Australian supermarket giant Woolworths tweaks its AI-powered assistant after users said it gave them the "ick".

items.title: UK withdraws Tehran embassy staff as US-Iran tension sparks concern across region
items.dek: The US embassy in Israel has also told some non-emergency staff they can leave the country if they wish.
items.body: The US embassy in Israel has also told some non-emergency staff they can leave the country if they wish.
